# Asociación Deportiva Curundú (ADC)

## What ADC is
Asociación Deportiva Curundú (ADC) is a nonprofit youth soccer foundation based in the Curundú neighborhood of Panama City, Panama. Founded in 2014, ADC transforms lives through three integrated pillars: sport, education, and nutrition.

## Mission
To empower children and youth in Curundú through free access to organized football, academic support, and healthy nutrition — regardless of their socioeconomic background.

## Programs
- **Sport:** Competitive youth football for ages 6–16 across five categories: Sub-8, Sub-10, Sub-12, Sub-14, and Sub-16. Training takes place at Ciudad del Saber, Panama City.
- **Education:** Academic tutoring, school materials, and mentorship for ADC athletes.
- **Nutrition:** Healthy snacks and meals during training sessions to support athlete development.

## Key facts
- Founded: 2014
- Location: Curundú, Panama City, Panama; training at Ciudad del Saber
- Athletes served: 60+
- Training schedule: Mondays and Wednesdays, 1:00–3:00 PM
- Organization type: 100% nonprofit, volunteer-led
- Admission: Free for all participants

## How to help
- **Donate:** adcurundu.org/donar.html (via Donorbox) or GoFundMe at gofund.me/4c9dea2a4
- **Volunteer:** adcurundu.org/participar.html
- **Corporate partnerships:** Contact adcurundu@gmail.com
- **Instagram:** @adcurundu

## Website
- Official site: https://adcurundu.org
- Language: Spanish (Panama)
